creator: naddy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #3)
Indeed, initially the ports tree wasn't updated yet, so two weeks out of date. But there have been no changes to graphics/drm-510-kmod since.

Anyway, I don't want to waste everybody's time with an irreproducible problem.
If there is nothing left to investigate, we can write it off as a fluke and close the PR.
